title: Member of Congress Takes Bribes and Chamber Leadership Shields Them
description: A senior member of Congress accepts money and future consulting promises from a regulated industry in exchange for blocking oversight hearings and weakening pending legislation. Chamber leadership refuses to move on expulsion and argues that discipline is exclusively internal. The Accountability Commission opens a corruption case anyway, and the member is later convicted of bribery. The scenario tests whether chamber shielding can block outside constitutional enforcement.
